title: SITNASUAŊMIUT QUŊUWIT CEMETERY DEDICATION ON OCTOBER 1ST
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation (Sitnasuak), in partnership with community organizations, is glad to announce October 1, 2018 as the dedication date for the Sitnasuaŋmiut Quŋuwit. This quŋuwit (Inupiaq for gravesite or cemetery) memorializes the indigenous people who are peacefully laid to rest at this site located in Nome, Alaska.
